title: 20. Chat Player
description: Load, inspect, and replay saved chat sessions with optional role voices.

steps.title: Open Chat Player
steps.body: Chat Player is for saved-session replay and context loading. It is not the normal live chat box; use it when you want to inspect or replay an existing conversation.

steps.title: Load a Session
steps.body: Load chooses a saved chat session. Quick Load is useful when you want the latest or most obvious saved context without browsing.

steps.title: Inspect Messages
steps.body: The message list lets you choose a point in the conversation. Use Previous and Next to move through turns before replaying.

steps.title: Replay One Message or the Whole Chat
steps.body: Replay Selected starts from the chosen message. Replay Latest and Replay Chat are broader playback paths. Use these for listening checks and chat-session QA.

steps.title: Set Role Voices
steps.body: Replay Voices can use separate assistant and user voice references. Leave them on current TTS voice if you only want the normal voice path.

steps.title: Read the Status
steps.body: The status line explains whether a session is loaded, whether a message is selected, and what replay action is available.
